campus_overview.description: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering (DSCE) is located in Kumaraswamy Layout, Bengaluru. The campus provides a balanced academic environment with modern infrastructure, green spaces, and well-planned academic blocks that support engineering education and student life.
campus_overview.environment: The campus features landscaped gardens, tree-lined pathways and open spaces that create a calm and eco-friendly learning environment.
eco_friendly_initiatives: Green landscaping with trees and lawns
Clean campus initiatives through NSS activities

classrooms.smart_classrooms: Most classrooms equipped with audio-visual teaching aids and projectors

laboratories.description: Department-specific laboratories equipped with modern instruments for practical engineering training.

internet_connectivity.internet_bandwidth: High speed internet across academic blocks

campus_facilities: Auditoriums for academic and cultural events
Sports grounds and indoor sports facilities
Parking facilities for students and staff

clubs_and_activities: Technical clubs such as IEEE, SAE and ISTE
student_life_environment.campus_experience: The DSCE campus offers a vibrant student atmosphere combining academics, cultural activities, technical events and sports. The green surroundings and modern facilities create a productive environment for engineering students.
